title: Elevator and Escalator Installers and Repairers
description: Assemble, install, repair, or maintain electric or hydraulic freight or passenger elevators, escalators, or dumbwaiters.

tasks.text: Inspect wiring connections, control panel hookups, door installations, and alignments and clearances of cars and hoistways to ensure that equipment will operate properly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assemble, install, repair, and maintain elevators, escalators, moving sidewalks, and dumbwaiters, using hand and power tools, and testing devices such as test lamps, ammeters, and voltmeters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble defective units, and repair or replace parts such as locks, gears, cables, and electric wiring.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check that safety regulations and building codes are met, and complete service reports verifying conformance to standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate malfunctions in brakes, motors, switches, and signal and control systems, using test equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust safety controls, counterweights, door mechanisms, and components such as valves, ratchets, seals, and brake linings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read and interpret blueprints to determine the layout of system components, frameworks, and foundations, and to select installation equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect car frames to counterweights, using steel cables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain log books that detail all repairs and checks performed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Connect electrical wiring to control panels and electric motors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test newly installed equipment to ensure that it meets specifications, such as stopping at floors for set amounts of time.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in additional training to keep skills up to date.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate elevators to determine power demands, and test power consumption to detect overload factors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install electrical wires and controls by attaching conduit along shaft walls from floor to floor and pulling plastic-covered wires through the conduit.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach guide shoes and rollers to minimize the lateral motion of cars as they travel through shafts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install outer doors and door frames at elevator entrances on each floor of a structure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble elevator cars, installing each car's platform, walls, and doors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bolt or weld steel rails to the walls of shafts to guide elevators, working from scaffolding or platforms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble electrically powered stairs, steel frameworks, and tracks, and install associated motors and electrical wiring.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut prefabricated sections of framework, rails, and other components to specified dimensions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
